div1.entryFree: Twist, vb. to form into a thread by convolution: with --ed metal amorously impleached, Compl. 205. the smallest thread that ever spider --ed from her womb, John IV, 3, 128. a poor prisoner in his --ed gyves, Rom. II, 2, 180. Figuratively: began'st to t. so fine a story, Ado I, 1, 313.
